issues.title: Unused variable in test code
issues.detail: Multiple instances of unused variable 'body' in sequence_e2e_test.rs (lines 671, 1217, 1235, 1479, 1499, 1517). Variables are assigned via .json().await.unwrap_or_default() but never used. These should be prefixed with underscore (_body) to silence warnings.

issues.title: Future incompatibility warnings from dependencies
issues.detail: Build reports future-incompat warnings from redis v0.24.0 and sqlx-postgres v0.7.4. These are advisory but not blocking. Recommend upgrading dependencies when available.
